LanguageData.Make_OrganicComponent.description: Craft an organic component from raw meat and leather for living structures, symbiotic equipment, and flesh-grown weapons.
LanguageData.Make_OrganicComponent.label: make organic component
LanguageData.MakeBudFlesh_CrimsonFangSeed.description: Craft a crimson fang seed from organic components and plasteel. Plant it to grow a Crimson Bulb that can be harvested into a Crimson Fang.
LanguageData.MakeBudFlesh_CrimsonFangSeed.label: Make Crimson Fang Seed
LanguageData.MakeBudFlesh_FerriteSeed.description: Craft a ferrite seed from organic components and bioferrite. Plant it to grow a Ferrite Fangroot that can be harvested into a Ferrite Sting.
LanguageData.MakeBudFlesh_FerriteSeed.label: Make Ferrite Seed
LanguageData.MakeBudFlesh_FleshBladeSeed.description: Craft a flesh blade seed from organic components and plasteel. Plant it to grow a Bud Flesh Blade that can be harvested into a Flesh Blade.
LanguageData.MakeBudFlesh_FleshBladeSeed.label: Make Flesh Blade Seed
LanguageData.MakePersonalityParasiteEgg.description: Craft a personality parasite egg from organic components, bioferrite, and uranium. The egg hatches into a parasite that can carry a stored mind.
LanguageData.MakePersonalityParasiteEgg.label: Make Personality Parasite Egg
